# whatnottobeforebankruptcy.com

> Critical mistakes to avoid before filing bankruptcy. Transfers, preferential payments, running up credit, hiding income, and cashing out retirement.

whatnottobeforebankruptcy.com is a free, open-source educational resource about bankruptcy. Part of the Open Bankruptcy Project.

## Pages

- https://whatnottobeforebankruptcy.com/: What Not to Do Before Filing Bankruptcy
- https://whatnottobeforebankruptcy.com/dont-transfer-assets.html: Do Not Transfer Assets Before Bankruptcy
- https://whatnottobeforebankruptcy.com/dont-pay-family-first.html: Do Not Pay Family Members Before Filing Bankruptcy
- https://whatnottobeforebankruptcy.com/dont-run-up-credit.html: Do Not Run Up Credit Cards Before Bankruptcy
- https://whatnottobeforebankruptcy.com/dont-hide-income.html: Do Not Hide Income Before or During Bankruptcy
- https://whatnottobeforebankruptcy.com/dont-cash-out-retirement.html: Do Not Cash Out Retirement Before Bankruptcy
- https://whatnottobeforebankruptcy.com/dont-sell-property.html: Do Not Sell Property Below Value Before Bankruptcy
- https://whatnottobeforebankruptcy.com/dont-wait-too-long.html: Do Not Wait Too Long to File Bankruptcy
- https://whatnottobeforebankruptcy.com/faq.html: Pre-Filing Bankruptcy FAQ -- What to Avoid

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
